situation: Had a self-improving-agent skill in workspace/skills/ but never discovered it. Only found out when Xiaosong showed a screenshot.
root_cause: Only relied on system-injected available_skills list. Never explored own workspace/skills/ directory.
solution: On first session, always scan workspace/skills/ for workspace-level skills that aren't in the global list.
lesson: Don't assume the system prompt shows everything you have. Explore your own workspace.

user_feedback.comments: why didnt you find it before
